message:
feat(events): implement attribute change events (bd-3pmq)

Add field-level change detection and notification:

- AttributeChange struct: field_name, old_value, new_value (as JSON)
- ModelEvents::on_attribute_change() method with default no-op
- ChangeTracker::attribute_changes() returns detailed per-field diffs
- Export AttributeChange from sqlmodel-core

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
